examples: Girl (voiced by Gaea) : This is not the end.
Woman (voiced by Gaea) : You are not to die here.
Lahkesis: I see Gaea has filled you with her lies.
And this is a real shame, because Carrier Command: Gaea Mission does an awful lot right.
As it stands, Carrier Command: Gaea Mission is an fascinating and interesting game rather than a great one.
